title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
review: The worst one yet for me. It's incoherent, not very exciting, nor gruesome. Why is this even called Jason Takes Manhattan? Two thirds occur on a boat, and that portion is absolutely dire. Only one scene was filmed in New York. It really feels like they were making some this up as they went along, like the biology project scene. Obviously the boxing kill is good, but so much of the rest is just like hackneyed padding.
spoilers: "Don't worry we won't get caught with this cocaine!" And then they get caught twice in two minutes. I don't think they thought it through at all!
